text: Time is the most valuable coin in your life. You alone determine how it will be spent.
author: Carl Sandburg

text: You may delay, but time will not.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: The bad news is time flies. The good news is you are the pilot.
author: Michael Altshuler

text: Failure is not the opposite of success; it is a part of success.
author: Arianna Huffington

text: I have failed over and over and over again in my life. And that is why I succeed.
author: Michael Jordan

text: The master has failed more times than the beginner has even tried.
author: Stephen McCranie

text: Don't fear failure. Fear being in the exact same place next year as you are today.
author: Anonymous

text: A year from now you will wish you had started today.
author: Karen Lamb

text: Never let a stumble in the road be the end of the journey.
author: Anonymous

text: Success consists of going from failure to failure without loss of enthusiasm.
author: Winston Churchill

text: There is only one thing that makes a dream impossible to achieve: the fear of failure.
author: Paulo Coelho

text: Failure is simply the opportunity to begin again, this time more intelligently.
author: Henry Ford

text: You don't drown by falling in the water; you drown by staying there.
author: Ed Cole

text: Only those who dare to fail greatly can ever achieve greatly.
author: Robert F. Kennedy

text: Time equals life; waste your time and you waste your life. Master your time and you master your life.
author: Alan Lakein

text: The trouble is, you think you have time.
author: Buddha

text: Failure should be our teacher, not our undertaker. Failure is delay, not defeat.
author: Denis Waitley

text: You cannot go back and change the beginning, but you can start where you are and change the ending.
author: C.S. Lewis

text: No matter how many mistakes you make or how slow you progress, you are still way ahead of everyone who isn't trying.
author: Tony Robbins

text: Pain is temporary. Quitting lasts forever.
author: Lance Armstrong

text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

text: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: Believe you can and you’re halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: Everything you’ve ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
author: George Addair

text: Opportunities don’t happen, you create them.
author: Chris Grosser

text: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
author: Sam Levenson

text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

text: Well done is better than well said.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: Energy and persistence conquer all things.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: By failing to prepare, you are preparing to fail.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: The harder I work, the luckier I get.
author: Samuel Goldwyn

text: Courage is grace under pressure.
author: Ernest Hemingway

text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
author: Walt Disney

text: All our dreams can come true, if we have the courage to pursue them.
author: Walt Disney

text: If you can dream it, you can do it.
author: Walt Disney

text: It’s kind of fun to do the impossible.
author: Walt Disney

text: Efforts and courage are not enough without purpose and direction.
author: John F. Kennedy

text: Those who dare to fail miserably can achieve greatly.
author: John F. Kennedy

text: The only thing we have to fear is fear itself.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

text: Men are not prisoners of fate, but only prisoners of their own minds.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

text: Doubt kills more dreams than failure ever will.
author: Suzy Kassem

text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
author: Steve Jobs

text: You miss 100% of the shots you don’t take.
author: Wayne Gretzky

text: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
author: Chinese Proverb

text: Hard choices, easy life. Easy choices, hard life.
author: Jerzy Gregorek

text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
author: Winston Churchill

text: You don’t have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
author: Zig Ziglar

text: Motivation is what gets you started. Habit is what keeps you going.
author: Jim Ryun

text: Amateurs sit and wait for inspiration, the rest of us just get up and go to work.
author: Stephen King

text: Focus on being productive instead of busy.
author: Tim Ferriss

text: You do not rise to the level of your goals. You fall to the level of your systems.
author: James Clear

text: If you spend too much time thinking about a thing, you’ll never get it done.
author: Bruce Lee

text: Action is the foundational key to all success.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: Someday is not a day of the week.
author: Janet Dailey

text: Continuous improvement is better than delayed perfection.
author: Mark Twain

text: Don’t wait. The time will never be just right.
author: Napoleon Hill

text: Your future is created by what you do today, not tomorrow.
author: Robert Kiyosaki

text: The key is in not spending time, but in investing it.
author: Stephen R. Covey

text: Either you run the day, or the day runs you.
author: Jim Rohn

text: If you have time to whine and complain about something then you have the time to do something about it.
author: Anthony J. D’Angelo

text: A year from now you may wish you had started today.
author: Karen Lamb

text: The scariest moment is always just before you start.
author: Stephen King

text: What we fear doing most is usually what we most need to do.
author: Tim Ferriss

text: It’s not knowing what to do, it’s doing what you know.
author: Tony Robbins

text: It always seems impossible until it’s done.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: Life is 10% what happens to you and 90% how you react to it.
author: Charles R. Swindoll

text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
author: Buddha

text: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Whatever you are, be a good one.
author: Abraham Lincoln

text: If you tell the truth, you don’t have to remember anything.
author: Mark Twain

text: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
author: Mae West

text: To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

text: It is never too late to be what you might have been.
author: George Eliot

text: A champion is defined not by their wins but by how they can recover when they fall.
author: Serena Williams

text: You are braver than you believe, stronger than you seem, and smarter than you think.
author: A.A. Milne

text: Don't limit your challenges. Challenge your limits.
author: Anonymous

text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
author: Anonymous

text: The harder you work for something, the greater you'll feel when you achieve it.
author: Anonymous

text: Success doesn't just find you. You have to go out and get it.
author: Anonymous

text: The key to success is to focus on goals, not obstacles.
author: Anonymous

text: Dream big and dare to fail.
author: Norman Vaughan

text: Sometimes later becomes never. Do it now.
author: Anonymous

text: Don't stop when you're tired. Stop when you're done.
author: David Goggins

text: Wake up with determination. Go to bed with satisfaction.
author: George Lorimer

text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
author: Anonymous

text: It's going to be hard, but hard does not mean impossible.
author: Anonymous

text: Don't wait for opportunity. Create it.
author: George Bernard Shaw

text: When you feel like quitting, remember why you started.
author: Anonymous

text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
author: Thomas Jefferson

text: Success is walking from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
author: Winston Churchill

text: The only place where success comes before work is in the dictionary.
author: Vidal Sassoon

text: If you are not willing to risk the usual, you will have to settle for the ordinary.
author: Jim Rohn

text: I am not a product of my circumstances. I am a product of my decisions.
author: Stephen Covey

text: To live a creative life, we must lose our fear of being wrong.
author: Joseph Chilton Pearce

text: If you do what you always did, you will get what you always got.
author: Henry Ford

text: Don't let someone else's opinion of you become your reality.
author: Les Brown

text: A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Whether you think you can or you think you can't, you're right.
author: Henry Ford

text: I attribute my success to this: I never gave or took any excuse.
author: Florence Nightingale

text: Definiteness of purpose is the starting point of all achievement.
author: W. Clement Stone

text: Eighty percent of success is showing up.
author: Woody Allen

text: Tough times never last, but tough people do.
author: Robert H. Schuller

text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
author: Henry David Thoreau

text: Don't be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
author: John D. Rockefeller

text: If you are not making mistakes, then you are not doing anything.
author: John Wooden

text: If you want to achieve greatness stop asking for permission.
author: Anonymous

text: Trust because you are willing to accept the risk, not because it's safe or certain.
author: Anonymous

text: All our dreams can come true if we have the courage to pursue them.
author: Walt Disney

text: Good things come to people who wait, but better things come to those who go out and get them.
author: Anonymous

text: Successful entrepreneurs are givers and not takers of positive energy.
author: Anonymous

text: Whenever you see a successful person you only see the public glories, never the private sacrifices to reach them.
author: Vaibhav Shah

text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
author: Chris Grosser

text: Try not to become a person of success, but rather try to become a person of value.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Great minds discuss ideas; average minds discuss events; small minds discuss people.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

text: I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
author: Thomas A. Edison

text: If you don't value your time, neither will others. Stop giving away your time and talents- start charging for it.
author: Kim Garst

text: A successful man is one who can lay a firm foundation with the bricks others have thrown at him.
author: David Brinkley

text: The whole secret of a successful life is to find out what is one's destiny to do, and then do it.
author: Henry Ford

text: The distance between insanity and genius is measured only by success.
author: Bruce Feirstein

text: I believe that the only courage anybody ever needs is the courage to follow your own dreams.
author: Oprah Winfrey

text: If you can't explain it simply, you don't understand it well enough.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Do one thing every day that scares you.
author: Anonymous

text: What's the point of being alive if you don't at least try to do something remarkable.
author: Anonymous

text: Life is not about finding yourself. Life is about creating yourself.
author: Lolly Daskal

text: Nothing in the world is more common than unsuccessful people with talent.
author: Anonymous

text: Knowledge is being aware of what you can do. Wisdom is knowing when not to do it.
author: Anonymous

text: Your problem isn't the problem. Your reaction is the problem.
author: Anonymous

text: You can do anything, but not everything.
author: Anonymous

text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Thinking should become your capital asset, no matter whatever ups and downs you come across in your life.
author: A.P.J. Abdul Kalam

text: The starting point of all achievement is desire.
author: Napoleon Hill

text: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day-in and day-out.
author: Robert Collier

text: If you want to achieve excellence, you can get there today. As of this second, quit doing less-than-excellent work.
author: Thomas J. Watson

text: All progress takes place outside the comfort zone.
author: Michael John Bobak

text: You may only succeed if you desire succeeding; you may only fail if you do not mind failing.
author: Philippos

text: Courage is resistance to fear, mastery of fear--not absence of fear.
author: Mark Twain

text: Only put off until tomorrow what you are willing to die having left undone.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: People often say that motivation doesn't last. Well, neither does bathing - that's why we recommend it daily.
author: Zig Ziglar

text: We become what we think about most of the time, and that's the strangest secret.
author: Earl Nightingale

text: You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
author: Zig Ziglar

text: I don't regret the things I've done, I regret the things I didn't do when I had the chance.
author: Anonymous

text: Nobody can go back and start a new beginning, but anyone can start today and make a new ending.
author: Maria Robinson

text: Be so good they can't ignore you.
author: Steve Martin

text: The successful warrior is the average man, with laser-like focus.
author: Bruce Lee

text: To accomplish great things, we must not only act, but also dream; not only plan, but also believe.
author: Anatole France

text: What you do today can improve all your tomorrows.
author: Ralph Marston

text: Do not let what you cannot do interfere with what you can do.
author: John Wooden

text: If you fall behind, run faster. Never give up, never surrender, and rise up against the odds.
author: Jesse Jackson

text: If you want to conquer fear, don't sit home and think about it. Go out and get busy.
author: Dale Carnegie

text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
author: Les Brown

text: To handle yourself, use your head; to handle others, use your heart.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

text: Life is what happens to you while you're busy making other plans.
author: John Lennon

text: Do not go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

text: The best revenge is massive success.
author: Frank Sinatra

text: Strive not to be a success, but rather to be of value.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Two roads diverged in a wood, and I—I took the one less traveled by, And that has made all the difference.
author: Robert Frost

text: Life is 10% what happens to me and 90% of how I react to it.
author: Charles Swindoll

text: The most common way people give up their power is by thinking they don't have any.
author: Alice Walker

text: Your time is limited, so don't waste it living someone else's life.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Winning isn't everything, but wanting to win is.
author: Vince Lombardi

text: Every child is an artist.  The problem is how to remain an artist once he grows up.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: The two most important days in your life are the day you are born and the day you find out why.
author: Mark Twain

text: People often say that motivation doesn't last. Well, neither does bathing.  That's why we recommend it daily.
author: Zig Ziglar

text: Life shrinks or expands in proportion to one's courage.
author: Anais Nin

text: If you hear a voice within you say 'you cannot paint,' then by all means paint and that voice will be silenced.
author: Vincent Van Gogh

text: Ask and it will be given to you; search, and you will find; knock and the door will be opened for you.
author: Jesus

text: The only person you are destined to become is the person you decide to be.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

text: Go confidently in the direction of your dreams.  Live the life you have imagined.
author: Henry David Thoreau

text: Few things can help an individual more than to place responsibility on him, and to let him know that you trust him.
author: Booker T. Washington

text: Certain things catch your eye, but pursue only those that capture the heart.
author: Ancient Indian Proverb

text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: Everything you've ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
author: George Addair

text: Start where you are. Use what you have.  Do what you can.
author: Arthur Ashe

text: Fall seven times and stand up eight.
author: Japanese Proverb

text: Life is not measured by the number of breaths we take, but by the moments that take our breath away.
author: Maya Angelou

text: Happiness is not something readymade.  It comes from your own actions.
author: Dalai Lama

text: If the wind will not serve, take to the oars.
author: Latin Proverb

text: You can't fall if you don't climb.  But there's no joy in living your whole life on the ground.
author: Unknown

text: We must believe that we are gifted for something, and that this thing, at whatever cost, must be attained.
author: Marie Curie

text: Too many of us are not living our dreams because we are living our fears.
author: Les Brown

text: Challenges are what make life interesting and overcoming them is what makes life meaningful.
author: Joshua J. Marine

text: If you want to lift yourself up, lift up someone else.
author: Booker T. Washington

text: I have been impressed with the urgency of doing. Knowing is not enough; we must apply. Being willing is not enough; we must do.

text: Limitations live only in our minds.  But if we use our imaginations, our possibilities become limitless.
author: Jamie Paolinetti

text: You take your life in your own hands, and what happens? A terrible thing, no one to blame.

text: What's money? A man is a success if he gets up in the morning and goes to bed at night and in between does what he wants to do.
author: Bob Dylan

text: I didn't fail the test. I just found 100 ways to do it wrong.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: In order to succeed, your desire for success should be greater than your fear of failure.

text: The person who says it cannot be done should not interrupt the person who is doing it.
author: Chinese Proverb

text: There are no traffic jams along the extra mile.

text: You become what you believe.
author: Oprah Winfrey

text: I would rather die of passion than of boredom.
author: Vincent van Gogh

text: A truly rich man is one whose children run into his arms when his hands are empty.
author: Unknown

text: If you want your children to turn out well, spend twice as much time with them, and half as much money.

text: Build your own dreams, or someone else will hire you to build theirs.
author: Farrah Gray

text: Education costs money.  But then so does ignorance.
author: Sir Claus Moser

text: Remember that not getting what you want is sometimes a wonderful stroke of luck.
author: Dalai Lama

text: You can't use up creativity.  The more you use, the more you have.
author: Maya Angelou

text: Our lives begin to end the day we become silent about things that matter.

text: Do what you can, where you are, with what you have.
author: Teddy Roosevelt

text: If you do what you've always done, you'll get what you've always gotten.
author: Tony Robbins

text: Dreaming, after all, is a form of planning.
author: Gloria Steinem

text: It's your place in the world; it's your life. Go on and do all you can with it, and make it the life you want to live.
author: Mae Jemison

text: You may be disappointed if you fail, but you are doomed if you don't try.
author: Beverly Sills

text: Life is what we make it, always has been, always will be.

text: The question isn't who is going to let me; it's who is going to stop me.

text: When everything seems to be going against you, remember that the airplane takes off against the wind, not with it.
author: Henry Ford

text: It's not the years in your life that count. It's the life in your years.

text: Change your thoughts and you change your world.
author: Norman Vincent Peale

text: Either write something worth reading or do something worth writing.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: Nothing is impossible, the word itself says, 'I'm possible!'
author: Audrey Hepburn

text: If you can dream it, you can achieve it.
author: Zig Ziglar

text: Productivity is never an accident.
author: Paul J. Meyer

text: Until we can manage time, we can manage nothing else.

text: If you have time to whine, you have time to do something about it.
author: Anthony J. D’Angelo

text: Discipline equals freedom.
author: Jocko Willink

text: Do the hard jobs first. The easy jobs will take care of themselves.

text: Do not wait for inspiration. It comes while working.
author: Henri Matisse

text: It is not the mountain we conquer, but ourselves.
author: Edmund Hillary

text: Work hard in silence, let your success be your noise.

text: A goal without a timeline is just a dream.

text: Starve your distractions, feed your focus.
author: Anonymous

text: Do it now. Sometimes later becomes never.
author: Anonymous

text: Success doesn’t just find you. You have to go out and get it.
author: Anonymous

text: The harder you work for something, the greater you’ll feel when you achieve it.
author: Anonymous

text: Dream bigger. Do bigger.
author: Anonymous

text: Don’t stop when you’re tired. Stop when you’re done.
author: Anonymous

text: Do something today that your future self will thank you for.
author: Anonymous

text: Little things make big days.
author: Anonymous

text: It’s going to be hard, but hard does not mean impossible.
author: Anonymous

text: Don’t wait for opportunity. Create it.
author: Anonymous

text: Sometimes we’re tested not to show our weaknesses, but to discover our strengths.
author: Anonymous

text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
author: Anonymous

text: Every day is a second chance.
author: Anonymous

text: Make your vision so clear that your fears become irrelevant.
author: Anonymous

text: Stay focused and extra sparkly.
author: Anonymous

text: Success is what happens after you have survived all your mistakes.
author: Anora Lee

text: You are your only limit.
author: Anonymous

text: Turn your wounds into wisdom.
author: Oprah Winfrey

text: Excuses will always be there for you. Opportunity won’t.
author: Anonymous

text: Don’t call it a dream. Call it a plan.
author: Anonymous

text: Be stronger than your excuses.
author: Anonymous

text: Prove them wrong.
author: Anonymous

text: Work hard, dream big.
author: Anonymous

text: Mistakes are proof that you are trying.
author: Anonymous

text: Fall seven times, stand up eight.
author: Japanese Proverb

text: Never, never, never give up.
author: Winston Churchill

text: Everything you can imagine is real.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: Whatever you do, do it well.
author: Walt Disney

text: Have enough courage to start and enough heart to finish.
author: Jessica S. Yourko

text: Hate comes from intimidation, love comes from appreciation.
author: Tyga

text: Determine your priorities and focus on them.
author: Eileen McDargh

text: Be so good they can’t ignore you.
author: Steve Martin

text: You can’t use up creativity. The more you use, the more you have.
author: Maya Angelou

text: I never dreamed about success. I worked for it.
author: Estée Lauder

text: Don’t let yesterday take up too much of today.
author: Will Rogers

text: If you want to fly give up everything that weighs you down.

text: Never let the fear of striking out keep you from playing the game.

text: Change the world by being yourself.
author: Amy Poehler

text: Be the change that you wish to see in the world.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

text: Focus on your goals, not your fear.
author: Roy T. Bennett

text: Keep going. Everything you need will come to you at the perfect time.
author: Anonymous

text: You are much stronger than you think.
author: Anonymous

text: A winner is a dreamer who never gives up.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: Limit your always and your nevers.
author: Amy Poehler

text: There is no substitute for hard work.
author: Thomas Edison

text: You must be the change you wish to see in the world.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

text: What consumes your mind controls your life.
author: Anonymous

text: To succeed in life, you need two things: ignorance and confidence.
author: Mark Twain

text: Success is getting what you want, happiness is wanting what you get.
author: W. P. Kinsella

text: Your limitation—it’s only your imagination.
author: Anonymous

text: Work hard, stay humble.
author: Anonymous

text: Great things take time.
author: Anonymous

text: Small steps in the right direction can turn out to be the biggest step of your life.
author: Anonymous

text: A smooth sea never made a skilled sailor.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

text: The harder you work, the luckier you get.
author: Gary Player

text: Strive for progress, not perfection.
author: Anonymous

text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
author: Christian D. Larson

text: Every moment is a fresh beginning.
author: T.S. Eliot

text: Make today so awesome yesterday gets jealous.
author: Anonymous

text: Take the risk or lose the chance.
author: Anonymous

text: Stay positive, work hard, make it happen.
author: Anonymous

text: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
author: Steve Jobs

text: No pressure, no diamonds.
author: Thomas Carlyle

text: Die with memories, not dreams.
author: Anonymous

text: Obsessed is just a word the lazy use to describe the dedicated.
author: Russell Warren

text: If people aren’t calling you crazy, you aren’t thinking big enough.
author: Richard Branson

text: Good is the enemy of great.
author: Jim Collins

text: I didn’t come this far to only come this far.
author: Anonymous

text: Success demands singleness of purpose.
author: Vince Lombardi

text: Some people want it to happen, some wish it would happen, others make it happen.
author: Michael Jordan

text: Stop shrinking to fit places you’ve outgrown.
author: Anonymous

text: Outwork everybody in the room.
author: Anonymous

text: The only limit to your impact is your imagination and commitment.
author: Tony Robbins

text: Don’t be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
author: John D. Rockefeller

text: If you want to live an exceptional and extraordinary life, you have to give up many of the things that are part of a normal one.
author: Srinivas Rao

text: To achieve the impossible, you must first believe it is possible.
author: Anonymous

text: The question isn’t who is going to let me; it’s who is going to stop me.
author: Ayn Rand

text: There is no speed limit on the road to excellence.
author: David W. Johnson

text: I will win. Not immediately, but definitely.
author: Anonymous

text: Blood, sweat, and respect. First two you give, last one you earn.
author: Dwayne Johnson

text: If you set your goals ridiculously high and it’s a failure, you will fail above everyone else’s success.
author: James Cameron

text: If it doesn’t challenge you, it doesn’t change you.
author: Fred DeVito

text: Greatness is a lot of small things done well, day after day.
author: Ray Lewis

text: I am building a fire, and every day I train, I add more fuel.
author: Mia Hamm

text: The only way to prove that you’re a good sport is to lose.
author: Ernie Banks

text: The vision must be followed by the venture. It is not enough to stare up the steps, we must step up the stairs.

text: To uncover your true potential you must first find your own limits and then you have to have the courage to blow past them.
author: Picabo Street

text: Do not be embarrassed by your failures, learn from them and start again.
author: Richard Branson

text: To be a champion, I think you have to see the big picture.
author: Summer Sanders

text: Never let your head hang down. Never give up and sit down and grieve. Find another way.
author: Satchel Paige

text: There may be people that have more talent than you, but there’s no excuse for anyone to work harder than you do.
author: Derek Jeter

text: I’ve got a theory that if you give 100% all of the time, somehow things will work out in the end.
author: Larry Bird

text: It’s not whether you get knocked down, it’s whether you get up.
author: Vince Lombardi

text: I am the master of my fate: I am the captain of my soul.
author: William Ernest Henley

text: Whatever it takes.
author: Anonymous

text: Become the hardest working person you know.
author: Anonymous

text: The wolf on the hill is not as hungry as the wolf climbing the hill.
author: Arnold Schwarzenegger

text: Conquer from within.
author: Anonymous

text: Comfort is the enemy of achievement.
author: Anonymous

text: The pain you feel today will be the strength you feel tomorrow.
author: Anonymous

text: Do what they think you can’t do.
author: Anonymous

text: Success is my only option, failure’s not.
author: Eminem

text: I am not talented, I am obsessed.
author: Conor McGregor

text: The harder the battle, the sweeter the victory.
author: Les Brown

text: Work until your idols become your rivals.
author: Anonymous

text: When you want to succeed as bad as you want to breathe, then you’ll be successful.
author: Eric Thomas

text: Hustle beats talent when talent doesn’t hustle.
author: Ross Simmonds

text: If your dreams don’t scare you, they are too small.
author: Richard Branson

text: I will not be outworked.
author: Anonymous

text: Average is a failing formula.
author: Grant Cardone
